title: cirsium poeltii
intro: Cirsium poeltii, also known as Alpine Thistle, is a species of thistle native to high-altitude regions of the European Alps. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Cirsium poeltii include treating digestive issues, such as bloating and indigestion, as well as alleviating menstrual cramps and other symptoms associated with PMS. Herbal preparations of Cirsium poeltii can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in combination with other herbs to enhance their medicinal properties.
